errors.description: Hardware-backed trust root evidence verified and binds to federation, runtime attestation, ledger, anchor, TSA, and policy state.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Only correctly bound hardware trust-root evidence may be treated as verified.
Missing hardware root evidence cannot establish hardware-backed trust.
Unsupported trust-root types cannot be accepted as hardware-backed authority.

errors.description: Trust-root binding hash or trust-root fingerprint does not match expected governance evidence.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Mismatched hardware evidence indicates trust drift.

errors.description: Software fallback was used and is explicitly degraded.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Software fallback cannot be treated as full hardware trust.

errors.description: Hardware trust-root authority blocked verification because evidence was missing, unsafe, unsupported, or mismatched.
errors.fail_closed_reason: Blocked hardware trust-root evidence must not authorize governance actions.
